signup.heading: Sign up
signup.inviteError: We don't have "{name}" on our invite list. Check the spelling, or ask the friend who shared this app with you to add you.
signup.nameRequired: Enter your name to sign up
signup.pinRequired: Set a 4-digit PIN to sign up
signup.pinHint: Required. Use this PIN to recover access if you change phones.
signup.pinRequired: This name has a PIN. Sign in instead.

pinPrompt.cardBody: Use this to manage your account and access your stats.
pinPrompt.sheetBody: This 4-digit PIN lets you restore your access on a new device and unlocks per-player stats.

states.finishedBody: Sign up for next week will be announced soon.

welcome.title: Welcome to BPM Badminton
welcome.invite: 🎟️ Invite-only — your name needs to be added
welcome.payment: 💵 Pay your share via e-transfer after the session
welcome.help: Ask the player who shared this with you for help.

roster.count: {count, plural, =0 {No players yet} one {# player signed up} other {# players signed up}}

admin.title: Admin
admin.signInHelp: Sign in with your name and PIN
admin.signInErrorRateLimited: Too many attempts. Try again in 15 minutes.

profile.anonymousBody: Account creation is invite only — contact admin for inquiries (beta).
profile.anonymousSignInErrorRateLimited: Too many tries. Try again later.
profile.anonymousSignInErrorAdminLogged: Signed in as admin — sign out first to recover a player account.

createAccount.title: Create your account
createAccount.body: Set a name and PIN. You can sign up for sessions afterward.
createAccount.errorRateLimited: Too many tries. Try again in an hour.
createAccount.errorAccountExists: An account with this name already exists. Sign in instead.

profile.pinUpdateFailed: Couldn't update PIN. Please try again.

stats.heading: Your stats
stats.subhead: Soon — a quick read on how you're playing, paying, and showing up.

players.empty: No one's signed up yet — be the first!
players.cancelFailure: Failed to cancel. Please try again.

forcePinModal.title: Set a PIN to keep your spot
forcePinModal.body: PINs are now required so you can recover your account if you change phones or clear your browser. Pick a 4-digit code you'll remember.
forcePinModal.whatIsThisBody: Until today, PINs were optional and most accounts didn't have one — so a single browser refresh could lock you out forever. We're making them required for everyone. It takes 5 seconds.

releases.howItWorks: Paste raw notes (or refresh from CHANGELOG), draft bilingual copy with AI, edit if needed, then publish — appears on the Home tab for all players.

recovery.pinPathHelp: Enter the PIN you set when signing up.
recovery.codePathHelp: Ask the admin for a 6-digit code, then enter it here.
recovery.haveCodeLink: Have a recovery code from admin?
recovery.errorRateLimited: Too many tries. Try again later.
recovery.errorAdminLoggedIn: Signed in as admin — sign out first to recover a player account.
